subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The promised Day hath come, and the mysteries of the Resurrection and the signs of the Hour have been made manifest and evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله یوم موعود آمد و اسرار قیامت و اشراط ساعت ظاهر و هویدا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prophecy and fulfillment
